titleStmt.title: SII 8.82: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 82. (A.R. No. 492 of 1902). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiṅkaḷerpiṟ(ā) vaḷara ṅkatirkkaṭavuṭ ṭolkulam viḷaṅkat toṉṟi malkiya vaṭaticaik kaṅkaiyum n=te ṉṟicai yilaṅkaiyuṅ kuṭaticai mahotaiyuṅ kuṇaticaik kaṭāramu nta ṇṭār koṇṭa tātai taṉ maṇṭalaveṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟitticaitoṟum ceṅkolocci Icaikeḻu teṉṉavaṉ māṉāparaṇaṉ peṉmuṭiyāṉāp parumaṇiypacun=ta lai perukaḷat tarin tu veṇāṭṭaraicai ceṇāṭ ṭotukkik kūvakattaraicaic cevaka n=tu laittu velaikeḻu kān=ta ḷūrcālai kala maṟuttaḷittu tikkeḻuñ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaneṉṉum matikeḻu kovirācakecaripanma rāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājā tirājade vaṟki yāṇṭu 3 10 2- Āvatu
tiruvuṇṇāḻikaisabhai yom paṇimakaṉ kṣatriyaśi kāmaṇivaḷaṉāṭṭu tiruṉaṟaiyūrṉāṭṭu Eṭṭiciṟuveḷūr kiḻavaṉ Araṅka ṉaravaṇaiyāṉāṉa vaḷavativākara muven=ta veḷāṉpakkal poliyūṭṭāl koṇṭa poṉ Irukaḻañcuṅ koṇṭu Āṭṭaiviṭṭaṉ poliyālp poṉ kaḻañciṉvāy poṉ muṉṟu mañcāṭiyu māṟumāvāka van=ta poṉ mummañcāṭiyuṅ kuṉṟiyuṅ koṇṭu tiruvaṇṇā malaiuṭaiyār koyilil Āṭavalār kāttikaik kāttikai viḻāvil tevar Aruḷumaṉṟu cān=tā ṭalukku Āṭavalārkkuc cāttiaruḷa cān tu mukkāl cān=tu Āḻākkum Eḻun=ta ruḷumpotu tūvac cān tukkum cān tu nāḻiyāl cān tu muṉṉāḻiyum Araittu
nām Iṟṟaināḷāl Ippaṭi ceytu Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟuñ cantrā tittavaṟ Inivan=ta ñ(ñc) celuttuvataṟkāka kṣatriyaśi kāmaṇivaḷanāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu Eṭṭiciṟuveḷūr kiḻavaṉ Araṅka ṉaravaṇaiyāṉāṉa vaḷavativākara muven=ta veḷāṉa pakkal Ippoṉ koṇṭu Ippaṭi nivan=ta ñ celuttuvatāṉom Ittevā tiruvuṇṇāḻikai sabhai yom .
Digital edition of SII 8.82 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
